entity.label: Ira
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Jairite and priest, a royal chaplain (2 Sam. 20:26) or confidential adviser (comp. 2 Sam. 8:18; 1 Chr. 18:17).

nodes.label: Ira
nodes.description: A Jairite and priest, a royal chaplain (2 Sam. 20:26) or confidential adviser (comp. 2 Sam. 8:18; 1 Chr. 18:17).

verses.text: And Ira also the Jairite was a chief ruler about David.
